confidenceReason: The setup path was followed once from a clean checkout; the credential gap was confirmed against the recorded materials.
evidenceSummary: Recorded setup builds the service and runs the sensors; one required credential is documented only in the private wiki.

basis.statement: The setup walk-through stalled at the credential step; every other step completed from recorded materials.

findings.condition: The recorded setup covers build and sensors, but the step granting telemetry read access points at a wiki page agents cannot reach.

criteria.criterion: A fresh session reaches build, sensors, and required access from agent-accessible recorded materials alone.

effect.statement: Latency verification needs a human hand-off in an otherwise self-serve setup, constraining operability to minimum.

evidence.statement: The setup document's access section links the private wiki for the telemetry credential; no agent-accessible copy exists.

findings.statement: The telemetry read credential needed for latency checks is documented only in the private wiki.

summary: Recorded setup builds the service and runs the sensors; one required credential is documented only in the private wiki.
